feature_name: Readable doc bundle and stakeholder alignment slice

scenarios.title: Self-hosted readable doc bundle generation
scenarios.summary: ProductOS can generate and review a same-day readable doc bundle from current artifacts, but publishing metadata and broader sync rules still need another pass.

scenarios.title: PM internal review of readable docs
scenarios.summary: PM manual validation confirms the roadmap and PRD are usable internally without forcing stakeholders to inspect raw JSON artifacts.

truthfulness_summary: The readable-doc slice is grounded in validated evidence, but the final promotion claim is still mixed with incomplete publishing metadata and sync assumptions.

dimension_scores.rationale: Readable docs remove most raw-JSON translation work, but the PM still has to close metadata and freshness gaps before the slice feels fully automatic.
The generated roadmap and PRD are audience-fit and traceable, but the bundle still needs one more quality pass before it reaches a true superpower bar.
Internal use is safe, but external publishing metadata and sync controls are still incomplete enough to block broader promotion.
The draft-then-review behavior is correct and useful, but the PM still needs targeted intervention for doc freshness and publishing decisions.
The workspace bundle and validation lane are stable across repeat runs, but wider sync and adapter parity are not yet proven for this slice.

reviewer_verdict.summary: The readable-doc slice is traceable and audience-fit enough for internal stakeholder use.

tester_verdict.summary: Schema, path, and bundle checks pass, but publishing metadata coverage is not complete enough for broader promotion.

manual_verdict.summary: The PM can use the bundle internally while metadata hardening and doc freshness automation continue.

blocked_by: External publishing metadata rules are not yet encoded in the readable-doc control artifacts.
Broader SharePoint and Confluence sync behavior is still undefined for this slice.

feedback_items.summary: Encode mandatory SharePoint and Confluence publishing metadata before the readable-doc bundle is promoted beyond internal use.
feedback_items.recommended_action: Add publishing metadata rules to the doc-sync controls and rescore the feature after another dogfood run.

feedback_items.summary: Automate doc freshness refresh so the PM does not need targeted follow-up to keep discovery, roadmap, and PRD docs current.
feedback_items.recommended_action: Add doc-freshness checks and rescore once the next validation bundle proves lower PM intervention.

next_action: Keep the readable-doc bundle active internally, route the metadata and freshness gaps into the next bounded improvement slice, and rescore after the next dogfood run.
